planNames.description: ONLY the comma-separated list of plan names the user wants to compare. Extract from 'compare [Plan A] and [Plan B]', 'difference between [Plan A] vs [Plan B]', '[Plan A], [Plan B] and [Plan C] comparison' patterns. Example: if input is 'Can you compare Silver Shield and Gold Care?', extract 'Silver Shield, Gold Care' only. Minimum 2 plans required, maximum 4. This field is REQUIRED.
